about.short: Computer Science undergraduate (AI & ML, 2026) with hands-on experience in full-stack web development and real-world problem solving. Passionate about building scalable applications using Java, JavaScript, Node.js, and MongoDB, with strong interest in AI-driven solutions.
about.detailed:
I am a Computer Science Engineering student specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, currently pursuing my B.Tech with a strong academic record. I enjoy transforming ideas into real-world applications by combining problem-solving skills with full-stack development.

I have built and deployed multiple projects including a real-time Air Quality Dashboard and a full-stack donation platform, where I worked extensively with Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, MongoDB, and frontend technologies. I also led a team during a college-level hackathon, where our project won 1st Prize for innovation and social impact.

Beyond academics, I actively participate in hackathons and technical events such as Smart India Hackathon and AI HackDays by Tech Mahindra, which have strengthened my teamwork, leadership, and practical development skills. I am eager to learn, experiment with emerging technologies, and contribute to impactful software solutions in a professional environment.

projects.title: Resume Skill Gap Analyzer and Course Generator Tool

Relevant coursework includes Data Structures, Object-Oriented Programming, Database Management Systems, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, and Web Technologies.
Completed Intermediate education with a strong foundation in Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry, which enhanced analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.
Successfully completed Secondary School education with excellent academic performance and a strong interest in science and technology.
